meta.title: Post-M9 SSOT Runtime Milestone Dossier
meta.description: Convention audit + M10..M22 readiness scorecards for ulta web-dx SSOT Zustand Runtime migration

props.title: Post-M9 Milestone Dossier
props.subtitle: 13 milestones inventoried — M10 proposed, M11..M22 drafted

props.content: M0–M9 shipped. M10 (effects command plane) awaits approval. This dossier consolidates the convention audit and per-milestone readiness scorecards so M10+ plans land in the existing seams.

props.label: LANE A · CONVENTION AUDIT
props.title: Repo Conventions After M9
props.subtitle: What web-dx/packages/core/runtime/ looks like now, and the seam M10+ plans must fit

props.title: 🧱 runtime/ is a flat kernel
props.content: Not a nested fractal. One `xxxRuntime.js` or `xxxOwnership.js` per domain, plus `slices/xxxSlice.js` factories. Do NOT create `runtime/providers/` or `runtime/hooks/` — the fractal is conceptual (slice + actions + compat = mini-provider), not directory.

props.title: 🔗 utils.compose triad
props.content: `import * as utils from './SameName'` → `export const composeX = (data, methods) => (payload) => {...}` → `useCallback(utils.composeX(data, methods), [deps])`. Unit-test the helper directly with mock setters; integration-spy the compose call. Never re-test business logic through the component.

props.title: ⚙️ createRuntimeXActions signature
props.content: `createRuntimeXActions({ runtimeStore, ...refs }) => { actionName }`. Guards with `if (!runtimeStore?.getState || !runtimeStore?.setState) return {};`. Local `updateXSlice(reducer, actionType)` closure calls `runtimeStore.setState(next, false, { type: 'domain/actionName' })` — third arg is the devtools label.

props.title: 🌐 DXL is weird — source-aware routing
props.content: Same DXL meta key routes to different legacy handlers depending on `source.path` (see `normalizeDxlResponse.js:22-44`). `useSessionAction` → `DONOTUSE_broadcastInitAction`; `OverlayProvider` → `updateContent`; `DynamicOverlayComponent` → `invoke`. Any M10+ that adds a source MUST update `getLegacyHandlerForInitAction`.

props.title: 🧪 4-tier testing ladder
props.content: Unit (sibling `X.test.js`) → Integration (`renderHook` + RTL `mount`) → Golden trace (`__tests__/ssot/*.golden.test.js`) → Harness (`agent-browser` via `pnpm ssot:dev:status -- --browser`). Ownership migrations require all four tiers; pure runtime fns only need unit.

props.title: 🏷️ Naming sunsets
props.content: Generic names only: `legacyPageState`, `pageGraphState`, `runtimeState`, `runtimeHydrationState`. Apollo names allowed only at existing API boundaries. `DONOTUSE_*` prefix for compat APIs awaiting rename. Sunset list closed: `apolloState`, `__APOLLO_STATE__`, `getApolloClient`, `getDataFromTree`, `ApolloProvider`, `RouteContainer` Apollo `useQuery`.

props.label: LANE B · MILESTONE INVENTORY
props.title: M10..M22 Readiness Scorecard
props.subtitle: Readiness = intent·.25 + outcome·.20 + scope·.20 + constraints·.15 + success·.10 + context·.10 · Execution floor: 0.90

props.label: EXECUTION TOPOLOGY
props.title: Dependency Graph
props.subtitle: Four parallel lanes post-M10 converge into a serial ownership chain

props.label: HUMAN-IN-THE-LOOP
props.title: Approval-Gated Milestones
props.subtitle: Intentionally below 0.90 floor per PRD — require explicit authorization

props.title: 🛑 M19 — Phase 4 Auth/Session Migration
props.content: Readiness 0.814. Replaces compatibility delegates with direct runtime command handlers for auth, session, and protected-flow. **Blast radius: high.** Depends on SE-08 redirect + SE-10 protected-flow golden traces (M18) and SE-12 trace hardening (M17). PRD says: _no Phase 4 without explicit human approval_.

props.title: 🛑 M21 — Apollo Extraction (Phase 5)
props.content: Readiness 0.779. Replaces direct Apollo usage with `dxlClient`, removes Apollo from hot client runtime. **Blast radius: very high.** Depends on full runtime parity (M14·M15·M19) + Apollo sunset prep (M20). PRD says: _Phase 5 only after runtime parity is proven._

props.label: RESIDUAL RISK
props.title: Below-Floor Milestones Requiring Mitigation
props.subtitle: Ralph rule: readiness <0.90 must record residual risk or insert a prerequisite before execution

rows.gap: Page response normalization overlap with SE-07 RouteContainer already-covered
rows.mitigation: Scope tightly to non-RouteContainer paths (SSR hydration + direct Apollo setPageData)

rows.gap: useSessionAction queue mechanics not fully trace-covered by SE-01 alone
rows.mitigation: Land M11 SE-02 first; keep M14 second-half-of-Phase-3c scope

rows.gap: overlayLayerHostTranslation.js already exists in shadow; needs cutover + dedupe parity
rows.mitigation: Use runtimeShadow.test.js as proof surface; require SE-09 M12 golden first

rows.gap: useDXLQuery + analytics emitters span multiple sources
rows.mitigation: Scope to single-source trace; defer cross-source analytics ownership

rows.gap: auth redirect + protected-flow refs are Phase 4 prerequisites
rows.mitigation: Ship both traces as one milestone to avoid Phase 4 blockers
Require human sign-off + full side-effect gate parity + 72hr soak
Defer until M15 complete; limit to boundary renames only

rows.gap: Intentional — approval gate + high blast radius
rows.mitigation: Require human sign-off + dxlClient parity matrix + rollback plan

rows.gap: Compat-wrapper removal needs all consumers migrated to selectors first
rows.mitigation: Block until post-M21 consumer migration is verified by fitness tests

props.label: PREREQUISITE INSERTIONS
props.title: SE-Trace Milestones Inserted Before Ownership Moves
props.subtitle: Mirroring how Ralph inserted M2/M3/M4/M5/M7 before M8/M9

items.title: SE-02 sessionData real-path trace
items.description: Before M14 session queue/in-flight ownership. Proves updateSession → setDxlUser → composeUserResolver ordering through real hook path.

items.title: SE-09 dynamic overlay real-path trace
items.description: Before M15 overlay/LayerHost translation. Proves useDXLQuery + setContent + useLayerHostMeta chain for dynamic overlays.

items.title: SE-11 page response normalization trace
items.description: Before M14 + M20. Proves Apollo page response → normalizeDxlResponse → pageDataSlice flow without RouteContainer overlap.

items.title: SE-06 data-capture analytics trace
items.description: Before any analytics-facing ownership. Scoped to single-source useDXLQuery emitter path.

items.title: SE-12 trace-system hardening (CI gate)
items.description: Infrastructure. Makes trace emission CI-deterministic — no URL params, no console-only, no unredacted PII.

items.title: SE-08 redirect + SE-10 protected-flow traces
items.description: Before M19 Phase 4 approval gate. Bundled because both are auth/session prerequisites.

props.content:
**1. Unblock M10** — approve the existing `.lev/tasks/m10-effects-command-plane/` proposal so Ralph can execute the effects command plane seam.

**2. Scaffold M11..M22 dna.yaml + execution.yaml files** — mirror M8/M9/M10 precedent, one task dir per milestone under `.lev/tasks/mNN-*/`. Parallel via subagents (one per milestone).

**3. Parallel-lane kickoff post-M10** — once M10 is green, M11 + M12 + M13 + M17 can run concurrently. Use separate Ralph sessions or lev exec lanes.

**4. Explicit approval recording** — for M19 and M21, document the approval request separately in `.omx/plans/` before any implementation work begins.

**5. Bisimulation test** — consider writing `shadow == runtime` parity tests early (Karpathy-style interpreter framing) so each ownership milestone's acceptance is _proof that the parity test still passes_ rather than ad-hoc assertions.
